title: capsella gotlandica
intro: Capsella gotlandica, also known as Shepherds Cress or Landcress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family, Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and stems are rich in vitamins and minerals, making it a valuable herbal remedy that offers several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving congestion, and supporting immune function. Capsella gotlandica can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and infusates, which can be consumed hot or cold to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
